title: The Next Threat Emerges
description: On pages 15–18, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Zoro, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The central beat is the next threat emerges.
scene: The scene focuses on the next threat emerges, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Zoro, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why are you in the lead!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That guy is a real brazen bastard

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: But wait, look!! She's not human!!

dialogue.speaker: Monet
dialogue.text: But... why's it snowing in here!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: My... my shoulder!! What's going on!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: B... but what about you, Captain- Chan!?

summary: The Next Threat Emerges. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
